title: VPN Connection Issues
summary: Reset credentials and reinstall VPN client. Check firewall ports 1194/UDP and 443/TCP. If issue persists, try switching protocol from UDP to TCP in client settings.

title: Email Not Syncing
summary: Clear local cache, re-add account via IMAP settings. Ensure 2FA app password is used instead of account password. Verify SMTP/IMAP ports 587 and 993.
tags: email sync imap smtp cache 2fa password

title: Billing Discrepancies
summary: Compare last 3 invoices against plan changelog. Prorated charges apply on mid-cycle upgrades. Contact billing team for adjustments on disputed amounts over $50.
tags: billing invoice refund charge prorate discount

title: API Rate Limits and 429 Errors
summary: Implement exponential back-off with jitter. Upgrade to Enterprise plan for higher quota. Cache frequently requested resources client-side. Review API usage dashboard.
tags: api rate limit 429 throttle quota backoff retry

title: Storage Quota Exceeded
summary: Archive old files or purchase an add-on storage pack from the billing portal. Use storage analytics to identify large files. Enable automatic archival policies.
tags: storage quota exceeded archive capacity add-on

title: Account Login Failures
summary: Check CAPS LOCK; reset password if account is locked after 5 failed attempts. Enable passkeys for better security. Clear browser cookies and try incognito mode.
tags: login password authentication locked account security 2fa

title: Two-Factor Authentication Setup
summary: Install an authenticator app (Microsoft Authenticator or Google Authenticator). Scan QR code from Account Security settings. Save backup codes in a secure location.
tags: 2fa mfa authentication security otp qr code backup

title: Slow API Response Times
summary: Check API status page for active incidents. Ensure requests use HTTP/2. Optimize payload size and enable compression. Use regional endpoints closest to your servers.
tags: api slow latency performance timeout response

title: CDN Cache Invalidation
summary: Use the dashboard Cache > Purge tool to invalidate stale content. Full purge may take up to 5 minutes. Prefix-based purge is available on Enterprise plans.
tags: cdn cache purge invalidate refresh content

title: Webhook Delivery Failures
summary: Verify endpoint URL returns 2xx within 10 seconds. Check webhook secret signature validation. Use the webhook debugger in the developer portal to replay failed events.
tags: webhook delivery failure timeout signature endpoint

title: Database Connection Pooling
summary: Set max pool size to 10x available CPU cores. Enable connection keep-alive. Use read replicas for read-heavy workloads. Monitor pool exhaustion via observability dashboard.

title: DNS Resolution Errors
summary: Flush local DNS cache (ipconfig /flushdns on Windows, sudo dscacheutil -flushcache on macOS). Verify custom domain CNAME records. TTL changes may take up to 48 hours.
tags: dns resolution cname domain propagation ttl

title: Downgrading Your Plan
summary: Downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle. Data over new plan limits must be reduced first. Export or archive excess data before the cycle ends to avoid suspension.

title: Monitoring Alert Fatigue
summary: Tune alert thresholds using the last 30 days of baseline data. Group related alerts into composite rules. Use severity levels to route critical alerts to on-call teams.

title: Enterprise SSO Configuration
summary: Configure SAML 2.0 or OIDC provider in Admin > SSO settings. Map group attributes for role-based access. Test SSO in sandbox mode before enabling for all users.
tags: sso saml oidc enterprise single sign-on federation
